meta.siteDescription: ETL Developer, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer with 2.9+ years at Amdocs — Azure Databricks, SQL Server, Power BI, and data pipeline automation.

person.name: Aditya Ajay Ware
person.headline: ETL Developer · Data Analyst · Data Engineer
person.tagline: 2.9+ years building and operating ETL pipelines, data warehouses, and BI solutions — from raw data to reliable analytics and stakeholder-ready dashboards.

about: 2.9+ years of experience in ETL development, data analysis, and data engineering with a strong background in data warehousing, data pipelines, and business intelligence.
Hands-on experience in extract, transform, load (ETL) using Azure Databricks, SQL Server, and stored procedures for data processing and automation.
Skilled in data analysis, reporting, and dashboards via Power BI; maintaining data quality, SLA, and KPI compliance for downstream systems.

Experience in building and optimizing data pipelines, data integration, and zero-touch automation in production environments. Seeking a role focused on data orchestration, analytics, and engineering excellence.

bullets: Maintain and optimize ETL pipelines for data orchestration, integration, and data engineering workflows using Azure Databricks and SQL Server.
Perform data analysis and data validation; enhance data warehouse performance through indexing and streamlined ETL to meet KPIs and SLAs.
Ensure data quality, availability, and consistency for downstream systems, reporting, and business decision-making.
Manage scheduling and timely execution of data jobs so data is ready for analytics, dashboards, and end users.
Monitor database and system health using diagnostic tools; implement zero-touch automation in lower and production to reduce manual errors.
Build and validate Power BI reports and data trending for stakeholders; support business intelligence and data-driven insights.

featuredProject.title: Analytical Business Intelligence (ABI) — Cricket Wireless (AT&T)
bullets: Built and maintained an automated data warehouse and ETL pipelines; transformed raw data into structured ABI metadata for analytics and reporting.
Developed data integration and orchestration workflows; integrated with Power BI for dashboards, visualization, and stakeholder reports.
Optimized ETL and pipeline performance via indexing and automation to achieve KPIs and SLAs.
Performed data analysis, validation, and trending; ensured data quality and availability for downstream systems.
Managed job scheduling and execution; implemented zero-touch automation in lower and production environments.
Monitored database and system health; supported BI and data-driven insights for the business.
